## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Evidence

Link screenshots, logs, artifacts, or reproducible checks.

## AI review

After the latest commit, add two separate top-level PR comments:

`@codex review`

`@jules review`

The AI review contract requires official Codex evidence for the current head SHA and
a fresh Jules request. AI review remains complementary to required CI and human
approval.

## Checklist

- [ ] Latest CI is green.
- [ ] Generated files are current.
- [ ] Visual changes include evidence.
- [ ] Codex reviewed the current head commit.
- [ ] Jules review was requested after the latest commit.
- [ ] Actionable findings are resolved or documented.
